phonetic: 藢k蓲艐伞r瑟藞伞e瑟蕛(蓹)n
phoneticUs: 藢k蓱藧艐伞r瑟藞伞e瑟蕛(蓹)n
meaning: n.闆嗗悎,闆嗕細,[瀹梋鍦ｄ細
examples: The congregation stood to sing the hymn.
She preached to the congregation about forgiveness.
Most members of the congregation begin arriving a few minutes before services.
The older church people interpreted, and the congregation leaned in, to hear the miracle.
The Catholic Church, by contrast, has lost 19% of its congregation over the same period.
